title: 심연으로의 하강 / Descent into the Abyss
prompt: Abyssal deep descent exploration BGM, 64 BPM, C sharp minor, sub-bass drone with distant sonar pings, pressure-building low strings, sporadic memory fragment chimes, claustrophobic and vast, underwater reverb space, seamless loop, no vocals

title: 파편의 춤 / Dance of Fragments
prompt: Memory fragment active zone BGM, 78 BPM, E minor, crystalline arpeggios with floating synth pads, occasional dissonant string swells, beautiful but unsettling, memories swirling atmosphere, loop-friendly, no vocals

title: 잔류 의지 / Residual Will
prompt: Residual boss battle theme in deep dungeon, 134 BPM, F minor, fragmented leitmotifs woven into aggressive arrangement, distorted choir, glitched orchestral hits, memory-corruption audio effects, boss loop structure, no vocals

title: 시간의 종말 / End of Time
prompt: Season 3 final boss theme, 142 BPM, B flat minor, time-collapse sound design with reversed orchestral elements, massive sub drops, clock mechanism percussion, building to overwhelming climax, phase transitions, no vocals

title: 끝없는 시련 / Endless Trial
prompt: Endless dungeon exploration combat BGM, 110 BPM, A minor, layered build-up structure starting minimal and adding instruments, adaptive intensity, tense but sustainable for long sessions, dark dungeon atmosphere, seamless loop, no vocals

title: 100층의 끝 / Floor 100
prompt: Ultimate challenge floor 100 boss music, 148 BPM, E minor, fastest and most intense track, full hybrid orchestra with electronic elements, relentless double-kick drums, ascending chromatic brass, choir singing in canon, boss loop, no vocals
